summary: HTTP Status Code SEO Fix Verification Complete - All 41 tests PASSED. Valid public routes return 200, admin portal routes (/admin/backup, /admin/database-sync) correctly return 200 (not blocked by BLOCKED_SUBSTRINGS), invalid/spam URLs return 404 with noindex meta tag, and API endpoints work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 442-455: block_malicious_paths middleware correctly skips portal paths (/admin, /reseller, /partner, /staff) before checking BLOCKED_SUBSTRINGS
route_validator.py lines 100-105: PORTAL_PREFIXES correctly defines all portal paths that should bypass blocking
route_validator.py lines 188-252: NOT_FOUND_HTML contains 'noindex, nofollow' meta tag for SEO blocking
frontend/server.js lines 62-70: Error fallback returns 503 with noindex tag instead of serving index.html with 200
context_for_next_testing_agent: HTTP status code fix verified. Key changes: (1) block_malicious_paths middleware now skips portal paths before checking BLOCKED_SUBSTRINGS, (2) frontend/server.js returns 503 with noindex on backend error instead of 200 with index.html. All valid routes return 200, all invalid/spam routes return 404 with noindex meta tag.
